intro.p1: Mintcom LLC is a technology solutions company specializing in Point of Sale (POS) systems and digital business management platforms. Our products are designed to simplify daily operations, from fast, reliable sales processing on digital devices to automated management tools that give businesses full operational visibility.
intro.p2: At the core of Mintcom is one clear goal: to give business owners accurate, real-time access to their data while enabling faster, smoother checkout experiences for their customers.
intro.p3: The Mintcom app is available on both iOS and Android and can be downloaded for free. Businesses can create a Mintcom account and complete setup directly through the POS app or via the online management dashboard.
intro.p4: Mintcom also supports multi-branch operations. Owners and account managers can add, merge, or separate establishments as needed, all from a single universal dashboard. This allows centralized control over sales, staff, products, and performance across multiple locations, with discounted pricing for additional branches.

story.description: Mintcom was founded with a mission to simplify business operations for merchants everywhere.
story.p1: Mintcom LLC is a Jordanian company operating globally. The platform officially launched in 2025, built on insights gathered from years of research into the POS and retail technology space.
story.p2: Development spanned more than three years, with a strong focus on security, performance, and scalability. Every feature was designed to meet real-world business needs and compete confidently with leading global POS solutions. Today, Mintcom stands as a modern, secure, and scalable system built to support businesses of all sizes, anywhere in the world.
story.title: Our Story

v1.description: Mintcom offers one of the most competitive POS solutions in the market when considering the full range of included services. Our pricing is transparent, with no hidden fees or unexpected costs, just a complete, all-in-one system at an accessible monthly rate.
v1.title: Affordable. Transparent. Complete.

v2.description: We developed Mintcom in close collaboration with business owners and frontline staff. The result is an intuitive system that can be learned in minutes, not days. Guided in-app tours and clear workflows ensure users always know what to do and how to do it.
v2.title: Built For Simplicity

v3.description: Speed, reliability, and usability are central to everything we build. Mintcom is engineered for fast transactions and smooth daily operations. Our UI and workflows are designed using behavioral insights and user interaction analysis, ensuring that critical actions are easy to access and setup is quick and effortless.
v3.title: Performance-driven Design

privacy.intro: Mintcom LLC ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our services.

retention.deletionRequest: You may request deletion of your personal data by contacting us or using the account deletion feature where available. Some records may be retained when needed for legal, billing, security, or audit purposes.
retention.r1: Account data: Retained for the duration of your account plus 30 days after deletion request
retention.r2: Transaction records: Retained for 7 years as required by financial regulations
retention.r3: Analytics and diagnostic data: retained in aggregated or de-identified form where practical

rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@mintcompos.com
rights.ri1: Right to access your personal data and request a copy
rights.ri2: Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete personal data
rights.ri3: Right to request deletion of your personal data
rights.ri4: Right to restrict or object to processing of your data

sections.s1_1_desc: We collect information you provide directly, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us for support.
sections.s1_2_desc: We collect billing and payment information when you subscribe, add a payment method, or manage invoices.
sections.s1_2_note: We never sell your personal information to third parties.
sections.s1_3_desc: We process the operational data you enter or generate while using the POS, dashboard, owner portal, and support tools.
sections.s1_4_desc: We automatically collect technical and usage information when you interact with the website and services.
sections.s1_desc: We collect several types of information to provide and improve our services.
sections.s2_desc: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, and communicate with you.
sections.s3_desc: We use technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect your information, including secure transport, access controls, and restricted administrative access.
sections.s4_desc: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who help us operate the platform, subject to appropriate confidentiality and security obligations.
sections.s5_desc: Mintcom supports multiple locations, brands, owners, admins, and employees. Access to operational data depends on account role, selected establishment, and assigned permissions.
sections.s6_desc: We retain information for as long as needed to provide the services, maintain business records, resolve disputes, enforce agreements, and meet legal or tax obligations.
sections.s7_desc: Depending on your location, you may have rights regarding your personal information, including access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection, and portability.
sections.s8_desc: We use essential cookies and similar storage for site functionality, authentication, language, theme, and consent preferences. Analytics and marketing technologies are controlled through the cookie banner and preference center.
sections.subtitle: How We Protect Your Data
sections.title: Privacy Policy

security.noAbsoluteSecurity: While we strive to protect your personal information, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
security.sec1: Encrypted HTTPS transport for website and API traffic
security.sec2: HttpOnly authentication cookies for server-managed sessions
security.sec3: Role-based access controls for owner, admin, employee, brand, and establishment data
security.sec4: Operational safeguards such as audit/activity logs, restricted access, and secure cloud infrastructure

sharing.obligation: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid legal processes.
sharing.sh1: Service providers who help us operate our platform (hosting, analytics, payment processing)
sharing.sh2: Business partners with your consent for integrated services
sharing.sh3: Law enforcement or regulatory bodies when required by applicable law

tc1.a1_1: First, check your internet connection. Try loading another website to verify. If the internet is working, try refreshing the page or clearing your browser cache.
tc1.a1_2: If the problem continues, try a different browser or device, then contact support with the exact error and a screenshot.
tc1.a1_3: If none of these steps work, contact our support team with details about the error you're seeing.
tc1.a2_1: Ensure your printer is powered on and connected to the same network as your POS device. Check that the correct printer is selected in Settings > Receipts.
tc1.a2_2: If the test page prints, reconnect the printer in the app settings and run another test receipt.
tc1.a3_1: Mintcom automatically syncs data when your connection is restored. You can continue processing orders in offline mode.
tc1.a3_2: When the connection returns, Mintcom syncs saved data automatically. If pending items remain, keep the app open until sync finishes.
tc1.a3_3: All offline transactions are securely stored on your device and will be uploaded when connectivity returns.
tc1.li1: Check your internet connection and Wi-Fi signal strength
tc1.li2: Clear your browser cache and cookies
tc1.li3: Try using a different browser (Chrome recommended)
tc1.li4: Restart your device and try again
tc1.li5: Ensure your firewall isn't blocking Mintcom
tc1.li6: Update your browser to the latest version
tc1.li7: Contact support if issues persist after trying all steps
tc1.p1: This guide helps you troubleshoot the most common technical issues you may encounter with Mintcom.

q1.answer: Mintcom is a cloud POS and business management platform for restaurants, cafes, and retail businesses. It helps you manage sales, products, staff, reports, and multiple locations from one place.
q1.question: What is Mintcom?

q2.answer: Mintcom can be used wherever your business can be onboarded and your payment setup is supported. If you are unsure, contact support before creating a new location.
q2.question: Is Mintcom available in my country?

q3.answer: In the POS you can accept cash, cards, and any custom payment methods you configure for the location. For card processing, use the terminal or provider connected to your business.
q3.question: What payment methods can I accept?

q4.answer: Settlement timing depends on your payment provider. Mintcom records the sale immediately in your dashboard and reports, while card settlement follows the terms of your processor.
q4.question: How long do payouts take?

q5.answer: Yes. Mintcom uses safeguards such as encrypted transport, role-based access controls, restricted administrative access, and secure payment and billing infrastructure. No online service can be guaranteed 100% secure, so account owners should also protect credentials, devices, and staff permissions.
q5.question: Is Mintcom secure?

q6.answer: You can reset your password by clicking Forgot Password on the login screen. Follow the link sent to your registered email address to create a new password.
q6.question: How do I reset my password?

q7.answer: Yes. You can add multiple users to your account and assign different roles and permissions from the dashboard or owner portal.
q7.question: Can I add multiple users to my account?

q8.answer: No hidden setup fees. Subscription pricing is shown on the pricing page, with monthly and yearly options per location.
q8.question: Are there any hidden fees?
